Explanation: For the purposes of this Regulation, the word "pay" shall include all emoluments which would be admissible if he were on privilege leave." In the complaint under s. 33-A of the Act it was alleged by the complainant that the order dated June 19, 1965 smacked of vindi­ ctiveness or unfair labou_r practice and that his alleged termination was a cloak for punishing him. No facts were, however, stated in support of this averment.
